playbook.intent: AI-implemented feature with risk of vibe-coded breakage → repeatable per-feature spec→AI→review→ship loop without quality regression.
playbook.scope: Solo founder runs a repeatable feature loop: clean spec → AI implements → strict diff review → tests + shipping. The loop does NOT degrade into vibe-coded breakage even after weeks of usage. Exit artifact is a daily-usable workflow that another founder could follow.

success-criteria.criterion: Spec written before any AI prompt issued
Context window curated: only relevant files passed
Diff size kept <500 lines per AI iteration
Tests generated AND validated against spec (not just 'passes')

stage.name: Spec
stage.intent: Acceptance criteria, non-goals, file targets — before any AI prompt.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when criteria are atomic + checkable. Refuse to prompt AI with fuzzy spec.

stage.name: Curate context
stage.intent: Pass only what the AI needs. No giant codebase dumps.

tasks.task: List files the AI must see
Add memory / patterns relevant to feature

stage.decision-gate: Advance when context fits the model's window with headroom. Refuse 'just include everything'.

stage.name: Prompt + iterate
stage.intent: AI implements; founder steers. Small diffs only.

tasks.task: Issue first prompt with spec + context
Limit diff to <500 lines per iteration

stage.decision-gate: Advance when feature works locally. Stay if AI produces unfocused output — re-prompt with sharper spec.

stage.name: Validate tests
stage.intent: Generated tests must test the spec — not the implementation.

tasks.task: Verify each test matches an acceptance criterion

stage.decision-gate: Advance when test↔criterion mapping is 1:1. Refuse 'tests pass' without coverage check.

stage.name: Self-review
stage.intent: Read the AI's diff like a stranger would.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: signed self-review. Refuse to merge unread AI diffs.

extra.value: [Multi-agent orchestration — single AI pair only here, Auto-deploy from AI — human gates remain]
['AI coding tool live (Claude Code, Cursor, or similar)', Spec discipline in place (writing-specifications complete)]
[Skipping spec because 'AI will figure it out' — produces wrong feature fast, Merging large AI diffs unread — accumulates quiet breakage]
['Did the AI test the spec, or test what it happened to implement?', 'Could I roll this PR back in one revert, or did I cram 5 features into one?']
{human: faion get-content ai-pair-coding-loop-solo --format md, agent: faion get-content ai-pair-coding-loop-solo --format context, json: faion get-content ai-pair-coding-loop-solo --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
